#### \
Authors: *Brian Schilder, Jack Humphrey, Towfique Raj, Hiranyamaya Dash*\

##### \
README updated: *Mar-16-2026*\

## `echogithub`: Echoverse module: Extract data and metadata from GitHub.

This R package is part of the *echoverse* suite that supports
[`echolocatoR`](https://github.com/RajLabMSSM/echolocatoR): an automated
genomic fine-mapping pipeline.

If you use `echogithub`, please cite:

> Brian M Schilder, Jack Humphrey, Towfique Raj (2021). echolocatoR: an
> automated end-to-end statistical and functional genomic fine-mapping
> pipeline. Bioinformatics, btab658.
> <https://doi.org/10.1093/bioinformatics/btab658>

## Installation

``` r

if(!require("BiocManager")) install.packages("BiocManager")

BiocManager::install("RajLabMSSM/echogithub")
library(echogithub)
```

## Documentation

### [Website](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echogithub)

### [Getting started](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echogithub/articles/echogithub)

Sinai](https://icahn.mssm.edu/about/departments-offices/neuroscience)

# Package index

## GitHub repository queries

Functions for querying GitHub repository metadata and content

- [`github_branches()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echogithub/reference/github_branches.md)
  : GitHub branches
- [`github_code()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echogithub/reference/github_code.md)
  : GitHub code
- [`github_commits()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echogithub/reference/github_commits.md)
  : GitHub commits
- [`github_files()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echogithub/reference/github_files.md)
  : Find, filter, and download files in a GitHub repository
- [`github_files_download()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echogithub/reference/github_files_download.md)
  : Download files from GitHub
- [`github_metadata()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echogithub/reference/github_metadata.md)
  : GitHub metadata
- [`github_permissions()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echogithub/reference/github_permissions.md)
  : GitHub permissions
- [`github_repositories()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echogithub/reference/github_repositories.md)
  : GitHub repositories
- [`github_traffic()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echogithub/reference/github_traffic.md)
  : GitHub traffic
- [`github_user_events()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echogithub/reference/github_user_events.md)
  : GitHub user events
- [`github_workflows()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echogithub/reference/github_workflows.md)
  : GitHub workflows

## GitHub dependencies

Discover package dependencies and reverse dependencies

- [`github_dependencies()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echogithub/reference/github_dependencies.md)
  : GitHub dependents
- [`github_dependents()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echogithub/reference/github_dependents.md)
  : GitHub dependents

## GitHub Pages

Query and scrape GitHub Pages websites

- [`github_pages()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echogithub/reference/github_pages.md)
  : GitHub Pages website
- [`github_pages_files()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echogithub/reference/github_pages_files.md)
  : Find pages
- [`github_pages_vignettes()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echogithub/reference/github_pages_vignettes.md)
  : GitHub Pages vignettes

## DESCRIPTION file utilities

Extract and parse R package DESCRIPTION files

- [`description_extract()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echogithub/reference/description_extract.md)
  : DESCRIPTION file: extract fields
- [`add_owner_repo()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echogithub/reference/add_owner_repo.md)
  : Add owner/repo

## R package repositories

Query and compare R packages across CRAN, Bioconductor, and GitHub

- [`r_repos()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echogithub/reference/r_repos.md)
  : R repositories
- [`r_repos_data()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echogithub/reference/r_repos_data.md)
  : R repositories data
- [`r_repos_downloads()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echogithub/reference/r_repos_downloads.md)
  : Get downloads data from CRAN/Bioconductor/GitHub
- [`r_repos_opts()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echogithub/reference/r_repos_opts.md)
  : R repository options
- [`r_repos_upset_queries()`](https://rajlabmssm.github.io/echogithub/reference/r_repos_upset_queries.md)
  : R repos upset plot queries
